name: Jason Child
background: Jason Child has served as our Chief Financial Officer since November 2022. Prior to joining Arm, Mr. Child served as Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Splunk Inc. from 2019 to 2022. He has also held CFO roles at Opendoor, Jawbone, and Groupon, and spent over 11 years at Amazon in various financial leadership roles.
